name: workflow-forge
description: Bootstraps a project-tailored CLAUDE.md plus TDD, iterative review, a pre-commit test gate, symmetric-surface audits, capability sync, and TODO/WORKLOG tracking into any repo. Detects stack and OS to adapt.

tdd_mode.title: TDD enforcement
tdd_mode.description: How strictly to enforce test-first. One of: enforced (block writing source with no matching test), warn (remind only), off.

pr_target_branch.title: PR target branch
pr_target_branch.description: Branch that PRs open against and feature branches are cut from (for example staging or main).

precommit_gate.title: Pre-commit test gate
precommit_gate.description: Run lint and tests before any git commit and block the commit if they fail.

maintain_tracking_files.title: Maintain WORKLOG.md and TODO.md
maintain_tracking_files.description: Keep an append-only WORKLOG.md and a living TODO.md at the repo root, and remind when WORKLOG.md falls behind.

no_em_dash.title: House style: no em dashes
no_em_dash.description: Generate the CLAUDE.md and write commit/doc text without em dashes, first-person voice.
